Illusion Iksar  

Description

1: Illusion: Iksar

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 50 Skill: Divination
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 6
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel different.
Cast on other: Soandso 's image shimmers.
Effect Fades: Your illusion fades.

Game Description

Cloaks you in a shimmering illusion that makes you appear to be an Iksar.

Items with this effect

  • 10 Dose Essence of Iksar
  • 5 Dose Essence of Iksar
  • 5 Dose Essence of Iksar
  • Dometrius, the Master's Burden
  • Essence of Iksar
  • Essence of Iksar
  • Iksar Egg
  • Iksar Hide Mask
  • Potion of Transformation [Iksar]
  • Spell: Illusion: Iksar
  • Vision of Sebilite

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Vision of Sebilite
Spell: Illusion: Iksar
ClassLevel
ENC20
Expansion:

Duration:
36.0 mins
  • Comments (26)
  • Scroll 1 Quested (1)
  • Scroll 2 Sold By (1)
  • Scroll 2 Quested (1)
  • Screenshots (1)
Post Comment
Rarity
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2007 at 9:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591951735360
6 posts
Well, I've just spent 10hrs camping Trak's Teeth in hopes of getting this mask for my rogue, who's lvl 67 atm. Basically I just slaughtered the entire zone on more than one occasion, had a couple ranger friends come and help me for a couple hours each, and spent a bunch of time switching back and forth between my rogue and my ranger to track the mobs down... Nothing... Saw pretty much every other named, except Harbringer Dronik. Honestly, at some point they must have increased his rarity because I've camped other illusion masks and had no problem. Then again, it's not just a camp you have to watch here, it's dang near the entire zone... Anyways, as far as the foragers go... They would spawn in the NW corner, would kill like anywhere between 4-10 and then it would rotate back down to the south. As far as the foragers/hunters in the south; the foragers path east-west covering everything up the the underpass to get to the area old seb is in. The hunters seemed to path some what north-south. Anyways, you may find them in the SE, or you may find them any where in the south. The named all seem to path from the area to the west of the lake up to the EJ zl. Frustrating camp for me to say the least. G'luck to those that try this, may be because today was a patch day, knowing SoE, it just got a bit jacked up.

This is concerning the Iksar Hide Mask, sorry, been doing that dang camp too long and staring at this dang monitor.

Uomanrotyr 67 Troll SK
Shankinmeback 67 Dwarf Rogue
Uzman 56 Dark Elf Cleric
Soman 57 Dark Elf Mage

Edited, Dec 6th 2007 12:56am by Shankinmeback
▲ Page top
Trouble finding the quest info? See here
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2005 at 1:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592266080663
140 posts
For those who have trouble looking up illusion iksar (like I did), the actual scroll item that has the link to the quest is called Vision of Sebilite.

The quest is Illusion: Iksar. Hope this helps!


Edit: The spell effect is actually called Illusion: Iksar.

Edited, Sat Aug 20 17:11:59 2005
▲ Page top
froglok ton warrior
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2005 at 11:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591843534757
8 posts
the warrior can be found about middle of Swamp of No hOpe with more regularity .. i have done this qeust 2x in the last 2 days and find him there more than in FV
▲ Page top
Regen...
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2005 at 2:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592767554525
2 posts
As far as I know.. the iksar illusion DOES have regen on it.. I have the mask for my rogue, and this illusion for my Enchanter.. I dont see WHY they wouldn't have the regen so I am pretty confident that the iksar illusion DOES have a regen on it. unless I have proven facts that it does not (I haven't seen any yet) im going to say it does.
▲ Page top
Regen...
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2007 at 4:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591951735360
6 posts
Prove it to yourself, go get smashed up a bit, get away, watch your regen rate, put the illusion on, it does nodda. Trust me, got a lil chanter w/ the spell. It does nothing for you cept makes you look like a lizard. Oh, and also he's a DE, so all i notice is the loss in sight. Slightly helpful, but mainly the illusions are just toys.
▲ Page top

# Jul 14 2005 at 8:18 AM Rating: Decent

20 posts
Down near the windmill in the southeast corner, there are a pair of hills. I've just killed six tigers on those two hills alone.
▲ Page top
Illusion Iksar no regen?
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2005 at 10:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362349704
32 posts
As said below, Illusion troll has regen, why doesn't illusion iksar. As for being a QUESTED spell, I would think that they would have this one grant the 1 regen, perhaps even 2 regen because it's harder to obtain.

I for one can't stand using the ugly troll illusion for my chanter for a little regen when i need it.
▲ Page top
RE: Illusion Iksar no regen?
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2005 at 12:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591823725151
16 posts
cabalis...........
▲ Page top
Quest
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2004 at 6:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801614672
61 posts
The hardest part is finding the mobs you need. I got all 4 items in 2 zones (Firiona Vie and Lake of the Ill Omens)
1) Ton Warrior Totem (NODROP) from a frolgok ton warrior in FV
2) Shaman Powder (NODROP) from a froglok nok shaman also in FV
3) Sabertooth Tiger Mane (LORE but NOT NODROP) from a Sabertooth Tiger in LotIO
4) Heart of Ice (NODROP) from an icebone skeleton in LotIO

In FV hail Luminare Pasinia (@ loc -3956 +2629) and say/ I will assist the great Luminare
Then /say I will collect the components
Hand her all 4 items and you will have a scribe in your inventory called "Vision of Sebilite"
When you memorize it it will be "Illusion:Iksar"
The spell is NOT NODROP.

Edited, Sun Aug 29 07:54:23 2004
▲ Page top
Iksar hide mask
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2004 at 11:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1606695552339
23 posts
For the iksar hide mask with this illusion on it.. where in the crap does Harbinger Dronik Spawn? I know its in TT but not a single person on three sites has placed a loc. Please help.


Aeryn

"Power is meaningless with out the honor and the courage to use it wisely"
▲ Page top
RE: Iksar hide mask
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2004 at 6:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1676852283084
74 posts
No one has put a spawn location because this is a 'wandering' mob. So it doesn't stay at a fixed loc, and can spawn anywhere in TT i would imagine.

I speak with experience, having had him drop the mask 2 out of the 3 times I fought him.

Salateen
65 Dru
Xev
▲ Page top
faction?
QuoteReply
# May 04 2004 at 9:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252915646
13 posts
Would this spell give a Highelf agnostic enchanter the ability to walk around the Iksar city? Sell to vendors? Do quests?
▲ Page top
RE: faction?
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2005 at 1:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591804680181
4 posts
Yes, it will.
Changing your appearance with any race may (or may not) change your faction. I'd suggest you don't try walking into the Wood Elf village looking like a Dark Elf...they can (and will) kill you.
But, being a Half Elf, or Human, for example, you'd be fine.
▲ Page top
vision of sebilite
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2003 at 8:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760173185
45 posts
The spell looks like "vision of sebilite", until you scribe it in your book... for those of you looking for it in the bazaar.

▲ Page top
where
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2003 at 10:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788763220
3 posts
where can i find Luminare Pasinia at - i got all 4 pcs but dont know where to take
▲ Page top
RE: where
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2003 at 11:43 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766778716
Scholar
42 posts
She can be found in Firiona Vie, with the INT caster trainers. The building she is in is sort of hidden. If you're standing at the ramp leading up to the fort, looking up at the fort, there are some wooden buildings to the left. The trainers are in a building behind another.
▲ Page top
Ignorant question
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2003 at 10:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781171842
151 posts
Can enchanters cast illusions on others, or are they self only spells?
▲ Page top
RE: Ignorant question
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2003 at 12:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966214912
Scholar
281 posts
yes, from level 62, enchanters can buy project illusion AA ...
before that, there are spells designed to turn other players into, for example ,a werewolf or a scarecrow.. which are basically visible buffs.
▲ Page top
RE: Ignorant question
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2003 at 4:34 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766778716
Scholar
42 posts
Generally speaking, all enchanter-cast illusions are self-only. There are now potions that grant illusions, and I believe there is a new High-level AA ability that will allow enchanters to cast their illusions on others.
▲ Page top
